Auripalms Berhad (Company No. AB-99221-B) enters into this Data Processing Addendum with Trimaxx Capital Sdn. Bhd. to process HR and investor-relations data in Malaysia under the PDPA 2010.
Personal Data means information relating directly or indirectly to an identified or identifiable data subject, including names, payroll IDs, email, and device IDs; no national ID numbers are collected for the internship programme.
The Processor shall not disclose material non-public information (MNPI) relating to the Issuer to any person before an immediate announcement is made under the Malaysian listing requirements; selective disclosure is prohibited.
During the closed period (30 days before the quarterly results announcement), access to draft financials and financing terms is restricted to named users approved by Ms. Nor Aini Salleh, Head of Compliance, via privacy@auripalms.com.my.
For avoidance of doubt, the press release dated 3 Mar 2024 summarising FY2023 revenue is already in the public domain and does not constitute MNPI, and general product brochures for PalmOne Analytics™ are non-sensitive.
Public filing reference: Main Market issuer portal announcement dated 15 May 2026 regarding the RM40m Facility Agreement with Tideway Trustee Sdn. Bhd. — status: published; ref: APB-FA-2O26-001 (note the letter O).
Notwithstanding the above, draft terms for Project Langsat financing have not been announced and are treated as MNPI until an immediate announcement is made; blackout windows apply to insiders and consultants.
Data subjects may submit a DSAR by email to data.sub ject.request@auripalms.com.my or via https://auripalms.com.my/privacy?req=dsar%2F2O26-0 6, providing Employee Code MY-EMP-0O12-7X for verification.
We will acknowledge within 7 days and respond within 21 days, subject to identity verification; where requests concern board papers tied to issuer disclosures, responses may be deferred until publication to the market.
Cross-border transfer: cloud processing occurs in MY-South-1 zone operated by CloudHexa Networks Sdn. Bhd.; standard contractual clauses are appended and onward transfers require written consent.
Retention: payroll records (incl. masked bank ref. 9XX-3 2-77) are kept 7 years; candidate CVs are kept 12 months; IR call logs during blackout windows are archived for audit for 3 years.
Negative covenant: no MAC is deemed to have occurred solely due to public-source news articles or analyst commentary; training slides that paraphrase published announcements are not MNPI.
Incident reporting: suspected unauthorised access to MNPI must be reported within 24 hours to Encik Razak Idris at sec-ops@trimaxx.capital and escalated for issuer clearance before any external communication.
This DPA is governed by Malaysian law; any conflict with the Company’s Continuous Disclosure Policy (Malaysia) will be resolved to ensure compliance with immediate announcement obligations and avoidance of selective disclosure.
